full_description: The organization shall document a policy for the development or use of AI systems.
The organization shall determine where other policies can be affected by or apply to, the organization's objectives with respect to AI systems.
The AI policy shall be reviewed at planned intervals or additionally as needed to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy and effectiveness.
Roles and responsibilities for AI shall be defined and allocated according to the needs of the organization.
The organization shall define and put in place a process to report concerns about the organization's role with respect to an AI system throughout its life cycle.
The organization shall identify and document relevant resources required for the activities at given AI system life cycle stages and other AI-related activities relevant for the organization.
As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the data resources utilized for the AI system.
As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the tooling resources utilized for the AI system.
As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the system and computing resources utilized for the AI system.

As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the human resources and their competences utilized for the development, deployment, operation, change management, maintenance, transfer and decommissioning, as well as verification and integration of the AI system.

The organization shall establish a process to assess the potential consequences for individuals or groups of individuals, or both, and societies that can result from the AI system throughout its life cycle.

control_name: Documentation of AI system impact assessments
full_description: The organization shall document the results of AI system impact assessments and retain results for a defined period.

control_name: Assessing AI system impact on individuals or groups of individuals
full_description: The organization shall assess and document the potential impacts of AI systems to individuals or groups of individuals throughout the system's life cycle.

control_name: Assessing societal impacts of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall assess and document the potential societal impacts of their AI systems throughout their life cycle.

control_name: Objectives for responsible development of AI system
category_name: Management guidance for AI system development
full_description: The organization shall identify and document objectives to guide the responsible development AI systems, and take those objectives into account and integrate measures to achieve them in the development life cycle.

control_name: Processes for responsible AI system design and development
category_name: Management guidance for AI system development
full_description: The organization shall define and document the specific processes for the responsible design and development of the AI system.
The organization shall specify and document requirements for new AI systems or material enhancements to existing systems.

control_name: Documentation of AI system design and development
full_description: The organization shall document the AI system design and development based on organizational objectives, documented requirements and specification criteria.
The organization shall define and document verification and validation measures for the AI system and specify criteria for their use.
The organization shall document a deployment plan and ensure that appropriate requirements are met prior to deployment.

The organization shall define and document the necessary elements for the ongoing operation of the AI system. At the minimum, this should include system and performance monitoring, repairs, updates and support.

The organization shall determine what AI system technical documentation is needed for each relevant category of interested parties, such as users, partners, supervisory authorities, and provide the technical documentation to them in the appropriate form.

control_name: AI system recording of event logs
full_description: The organization shall determine at which phases of the AI system life cycle, record keeping of event logs should be enabled, but at the minimum when the AI system is in use.

control_name: Data for development and enhancement of AI system
full_description: The organization shall define, document and implement data management processes related to the development of AI systems.
The organization shall determine and document details about the acquisition and selection of the data used in AI systems.

control_name: Quality of data for AI systems
full_description: The organization shall define and document requirements for data quality and ensure that data used to develop and operate the AI system meet those requirements.
The organization shall define and document a process for recording the provenance of data used in its AI systems over the life cycles of the data and the AI system.
The organization shall define and document its criteria for selecting data preparations and the data preparation methods to be used.

control_name: System documentation and information for users
category_name: Information for interested parties of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall determine and provide the necessary information to users of the AI system.

category_name: Information for interested parties of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall provide capabilities for interested parties to report adverse impacts of the AI system.

category_name: Information for interested parties of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall determine and document a plan for communicating incidents to users of the AI system.

category_name: Information for interested parties of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall determine and document their obligations to reporting information about the AI system to interested parties.

control_name: Processes for responsible use of AI systems
full_description: The organization shall define and document the processes for the responsible use of AI systems.

control_name: Objectives for responsible use of AI system
full_description: The organization shall identify and document objectives to guide the responsible use of AI systems.

control_name: Intended use of the AI system
full_description: The organization shall ensure that the AI system is used according to the intended uses of the AI system and its accompanying documentation.
The organization shall ensure that responsibilities within their AI system life cycle are allocated between the organization, its partners, suppliers, customers and third parties.

The organization shall establish a process to ensure that its usage of services, products or materials provided by suppliers aligns with the organization's approach to the responsible development and use of AI systems.
The organization shall ensure that its responsible approach to the development and use of AI systems considers their customer expectations and needs.
